case_title: STINNER, CATHERINE VS BOB LEECH AUTO RENTAL et al

docket_entries.description: THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARD, DOROTHY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STINNER, CATHERINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARD, DOROTHY $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,515.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFT. BOB LEECH AUTO RENTA DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT. RYAN, CHARLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARD, DOROTHY
THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRAN- TED SUBJECT TO THE FF. TERMS:COMMENCING 5/1/97, $62.50 SHALL BE W/HELD FOR EACH DEFT'S PAY PERIOD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY STINNER, CATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT BOB LEECH AUTO RENTAL RYAN, CHARLES EDWARD, DOROTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
ACKNOWLEDGE RECEIPT OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION;NOTICE OF HEARING & NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM THE S. F. SHERIFF DEPT.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF APR-10-1997, GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARD, DOROTHY
